title: Multi-Airline Gold Travelers
description: You are given four tables: airlines, passengers, flights, and bookings. Find names of gold-tier passengers who have flown with at least 2 distinct airlines, ordered alphabetically.
inputFormat:
airlines(id, name, country)
passengers(id, name, tier)
flights(id, flight_no, airline_id, origin, destination)
bookings(id, passenger_id, flight_id, seat_class)
outputFormat: One passenger name per line, ordered alphabetically.
constraints: Use three JOINs and GROUP BY. Filter WHERE tier = 'gold'. Use HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT airline_id) >= 2. Include ORDER BY name. Only SELECT queries are allowed.
sampleSolution: SELECT p.name FROM passengers p JOIN bookings b ON p.id = b.passenger_id JOIN flights f ON b.flight_id = f.id JOIN airlines a ON f.airline_id = a.id WHERE p.tier = 'gold' GROUP BY p.id, p.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) >= 2 ORDER BY p.name;
hint: Join passengers → bookings → flights → airlines, filter gold tier, GROUP BY passenger, HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT airline_id) >= 2.

testCases.setupSql: CREATE TABLE airlines (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE passengers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, tier TEXT); CREATE TABLE flights (id INTEGER, flight_no TEXT, airline_id INTEGER, origin TEXT, destination TEXT); CREATE TABLE bookings (id INTEGER, passenger_id INTEGER, flight_id INTEGER, seat_class TEXT); INSERT INTO airlines VALUES (1,'AirX','US'),(2,'JetY','UK'),(3,'FlyZ','DE'); INSERT INTO passengers VALUES (1,'Alice','gold'),(2,'Bob','silver'),(3,'Carol','gold'); INSERT INTO flights VALUES (1,'AX100',1,'NYC','LAX'),(2,'JY200',2,'LHR','CDG'),(3,'FZ300',3,'FRA','MUC'),(4,'AX200',1,'LAX','NYC'); INSERT INTO bookings VALUES (1,1,1,'business'),(2,1,2,'economy'),(3,2,1,'economy'),(4,3,3,'business');

CREATE TABLE airlines (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE passengers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, tier TEXT); CREATE TABLE flights (id INTEGER, flight_no TEXT, airline_id INTEGER, origin TEXT, destination TEXT); CREATE TABLE bookings (id INTEGER, passenger_id INTEGER, flight_id INTEGER, seat_class TEXT); INSERT INTO airlines VALUES (1,'SkyA','US'),(2,'WingB','FR'),(3,'JetC','JP'); INSERT INTO passengers VALUES (1,'Dan','gold'),(2,'Eve','gold'),(3,'Frank','bronze'),(4,'Grace','gold'); INSERT INTO flights VALUES (1,'SA1',1,'JFK','LAX'),(2,'WB1',2,'CDG','FCO'),(3,'JC1',3,'NRT','ICN'),(4,'SA2',1,'LAX','SFO'); INSERT INTO bookings VALUES (1,1,1,'eco'),(2,1,2,'bus'),(3,2,1,'eco'),(4,2,3,'eco'),(5,3,1,'bus'),(6,4,4,'eco');

CREATE TABLE airlines (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE passengers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, tier TEXT); CREATE TABLE flights (id INTEGER, flight_no TEXT, airline_id INTEGER, origin TEXT, destination TEXT); CREATE TABLE bookings (id INTEGER, passenger_id INTEGER, flight_id INTEGER, seat_class TEXT); INSERT INTO airlines VALUES (1,'UniAir','US'); INSERT INTO passengers VALUES (1,'Hank','gold'),(2,'Iris','gold'); INSERT INTO flights VALUES (1,'UA1',1,'NYC','LA'),(2,'UA2',1,'LA','NYC'); INSERT INTO bookings VALUES (1,1,1,'eco'),(2,2,2,'bus');

CREATE TABLE airlines (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE passengers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, tier TEXT); CREATE TABLE flights (id INTEGER, flight_no TEXT, airline_id INTEGER, origin TEXT, destination TEXT); CREATE TABLE bookings (id INTEGER, passenger_id INTEGER, flight_id INTEGER, seat_class TEXT); INSERT INTO airlines VALUES (1,'AlphaAir','DE'),(2,'BetaAir','FR'),(3,'GammaAir','UK'); INSERT INTO passengers VALUES (1,'Jack','gold'),(2,'Kate','gold'),(3,'Leo','silver'); INSERT INTO flights VALUES (1,'AA1',1,'BER','CDG'),(2,'BA1',2,'CDG','LHR'),(3,'GA1',3,'LHR','BER'); INSERT INTO bookings VALUES (1,1,1,'bus'),(2,1,2,'eco'),(3,1,3,'bus'),(4,2,1,'eco'),(5,2,2,'bus'),(6,3,3,'eco');

CREATE TABLE airlines (id INTEGER, name TEXT, country TEXT); CREATE TABLE passengers (id INTEGER, name TEXT, tier TEXT); CREATE TABLE flights (id INTEGER, flight_no TEXT, airline_id INTEGER, origin TEXT, destination TEXT); CREATE TABLE bookings (id INTEGER, passenger_id INTEGER, flight_id INTEGER, seat_class TEXT); INSERT INTO airlines VALUES (1,'Nord','NO'),(2,'Sud','IT'); INSERT INTO passengers VALUES (1,'Mia','gold'),(2,'Nan','bronze'); INSERT INTO flights VALUES (1,'NO1',1,'OSL','FCO'),(2,'IT1',2,'FCO','OSL'); INSERT INTO bookings VALUES (1,1,1,'bus'),(2,1,2,'eco'),(3,2,1,'eco');
